text.tspan: (changed) Unemployment rate in people with vs. without disability,
Unemployment refers to individuals of working age (typically 15 years and over) currently unemployed but actively seeking
work. A person with a disability is defined as someone limited in the kind or amount of activities they can do due to a

Unemployment rate in persons with disability
(plotted on a logarithmic axis)

Unemployment rate in persons without disability
(plotted on a logarithmic axis)
